_comment: Authored tour catalog. One record per reusable tour product. Instances (scheduled departures) are generated at runtime from scheduleRule in data.php — not stored here. See SCHEMA.md.

tours.title: I Love Comedy Tour
tours.tagline: Part walking tour, part comedy crash course, 100% New York.
tours.shortDescription: A 30-minute guided walk through Greenwich Village, capped off with a live stand-up show at a real NYC comedy club.
tours.description:
A quick-hit introduction to the place where modern comedy was born. Guided by working comedians, you'll explore Greenwich Village's legendary comedy roots, learn how stand-up really works, and hear stories you won't get from a history book.

The experience wraps up exactly where it should: inside a real New York comedy club, where your night continues with a live stand-up show.

Part walking tour, part comedy crash course, and 100% New York.

meetingPoint.name: Meeting Point (TBD)
meetingPoint.notes: Exact meeting point TBD — somewhere in Greenwich Village. Update this field once confirmed; nothing in the UI needs to change.

endPoint.name: The Grisly Pear Comedy Club
endPoint.notes: Tour concludes at the Grisly Pear for a live stand-up show. Two drink tickets included to cover the club's two-drink minimum.

whyThisTour.headline: Short, high-energy, easy to fit into your night

tours.whyThisTourFooter: Perfect for visitors, locals, date nights… anyone who loves comedy!

scheduleRule._comment: daysOfWeek: 0=Sun, 1=Mon … 6=Sat. timeSlots: 24h HH:MM. horizonDays: how far forward to auto-generate instances.

addons.label: Tour T-Shirt
addons.description: Black tee, tour cities on the back.
